info.description:
Unified payment routing engine and secure webhook proxies for African developers.

Production Server: https://paye.africa
Local Server: http://localhost:8080

Authentication Modes:
1. Bearer JWT Token: Passed as "Authorization: Bearer <token>". Scoped to Dashboard CRUD resources (projects, provider credentials, webhook routes, logs).
2. API Key Header: Passed as "X-Paye-API-Key: paye_live_...". Scoped to server-to-server transaction initializations, refunds, and payouts.
info.title: Paye API

post.description: Sign in using email and password
Create a user account and return JWT credentials

get.description: Retrieve recent webhook proxy delivery log history (paginated)
Retrieve aggregated payment stats, including volumes, counts, and active providers
Retrieve a list of all payment providers from the system database
Retrieve list of all provider configs for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a provider configuration for the authenticated user

put.description: Update fields of a specific provider config

patch.description: Enable or disable a specific provider configuration

get.description: Retrieve a list of payment transactions for the authenticated merchant.

post.description: Initialize a payment transaction with a selected provider (e.g., Paystack).

get.description: Query and verify a transaction status from the payment provider.
Retrieve all webhook configs for the authenticated user

post.description: Register a webhook callback target for a specific provider

get.description: Retrieve webhooks logs for the authenticated project scoped by active mode

post.description: Public proxy endpoint that receives webhooks from providers (e.g. Paystack) and forwards them to target URL

ApiKeyAuth.description: The merchant's API Key (e.g., paye_live_... or paye_test_...).
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Paye-API-Key
